description_long: This is a modern, minimalist bed with a rectangular platform base and a tall, flat headboard. The bed frame appears to be constructed from a solid material, likely wood or engineered wood, and is finished in a light, neutral color. The mattress is clearly visible and fits snugly within the frame, topped with a smooth, fitted sheet. The bed sits low to the ground on short, sturdy legs, giving it a contemporary look. There are no visible footboards, side rails, or decorative elements, emphasizing its clean and functional design. The overall appearance suggests comfort and simplicity, suitable for urban interiors or contemporary living spaces.
description: A minimalist platform bed with a tall headboard, light-colored frame, and visible mattress, designed for modern urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall, flat headboard and the full width of the mattress.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the height of the headboard and the low platform base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the headboard and the rectangular shape of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the headboard and the mattress profile.
